title: Floria
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image= |name=Floria |homeworld=[[Thracior]]''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Blond |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Floria''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] from [[Thracior]] in the decade before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She was part [[Hnsi]] and [[Tantt]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|You know how to use a hydrospanner?''"
"''I didn't have a real weapon.''"
"''Were you threatening to kill me, or fix my speeder?|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] confronts Floria for the first time on [[Ragoon VI]]|}} Floria and her brother, [[Dane (bounty hunter)|Dane]], were orphaned when their mother's tribe burned down their house, because their family intermarried. The siblings found work at a café, though their employer treated them cruelly. When they found out that he was wanted on a nearby planet, they tricked him into getting caught. Realizing that manhunting was a more profitable industry than food service, Floria and Dane took up careers in bounty hunting. [[Granta Omega]] later hired them, along with four other bounty hunters, to capture [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during training on [[Ragoon VI]], but Floria and Dane found themselves assisting the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], instead. Years later, they became bodyguards for [[Samish Kash]], and Floria found herself falling in love with the Delalunan leader. When Samish was shot on [[Null/Legends|Null]], Dane and Floria were accused of the attempted assassination. Samish survived, though, and his friend, [[Lorian Nod]], informed Floria that he was alive. She and Dane reunited with Kenobi and Skywalker during the events on Null, and the two Jedi were able to prove that the siblings were innocent of the attempted murder charges. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' *''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' {{Ab|Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Floria }} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]]
